textByHash.04b30b709fd3de06b39103e6321d41aa47e79ac6: 'Some even say the dragonkin made corrupted versions of themselves for protection, what we now know as dragons. However, this has never been proven.'
textByHash.0cd4ed1a79dc849ab027081e85ccfa06db13526f: Okay let's see... The Corvo family... Here we are! According to this, there was a family by the name of Corvo living in Avarrocka for most of the Fourth Age.
textByHash.0fae4ab0347bd49ab8acfb84f588cc7ce7126cf1: I'm not sure where the book is mind you... but I'm sure it's around here somewhere.
textByHash.18593724a8e22427da41f2aa42dc1dd67717bf9f: Let's hope so. In the meantime, you should probably head over to the museum so they can verify the authenticity of this half.
textByHash.1c24876be3786c5e080e6140d50fcff36379985c: In hindsight, imprisoning a deadly mage in a library was maybe not a very well thought out plan, but it seems we have bigger issues to deal with for now.
textByHash.214174175f6e63a6b9c60363aa8f7360a080a31c: There's no doubt that some elements of these tales have been overexaggerated for storytelling purposes, but you should be careful of outright dismissing them.
textByHash.23e02c668c364c4ca85b73c3cca842b4cd4b115e: I'm not sure exactly... but I'm sure it's around here somewhere.
textByHash.2442e10a04f0def6c42302f62c0925a52e7d6f0e: Impossible to say for sure but it was around that time that many people left Misthalin to settle in Morytania. It's possible that the Corvo family was among them.
textByHash.2467ba8ab6fdf0b601f602320a4d7ebe86f4b785: Ah, Robert the Strong. There's some details on him in one of my books on the history of Gielinor. Let's see now...
textByHash.24f142b42853f47a8069a599f1c07f42123c7547: Well we do have census records which date back to when the city was still called Avarrocka. I'm afraid we don't have anything from before that time though.
textByHash.2516f5500a1d5237a8b9dc88902fc272b50b45b1: If you cross-reference the document with the latest census, you should hopefully be able to find their descendants.
textByHash.251bf1622a3dd71a6b6d8efe3017639e1cf44125: Ah... that is bad news indeed.
textByHash.27f1042b3d693d3259f2dd9a3333372bcca66757: Then perhaps you now have your quest?
textByHash.2e13fd2043721c4142417b1f5e49ea5a6bc0843c: The Imcando dwarves, you say? Let's see...
textByHash.2fd266df75b61d15495370fd9b4fa5e9779be9b6: Well in that case, I think I have what you need. There was a document on the desk in the corner listing the elders who sent Arrav on his original quest for the Shield of Arrav.
textByHash.359dfe525cde0bba8bdbc5bdbc96cf615ccfbf60: Well, truth be told, I would probably be here even if it wasn't where I worked. I very much like reading, not to mention sharing what I learn with all who are interested.
textByHash.35d1b2607b838cd5cbc45750ed1decfe6aa523aa: King Roald has been very generous with my salary, so I can spare you some coins for your trouble.
textByHash.3743cf691344f3c52d1d4ede1633af31b919ef66: I'm normally the first person to chat about local history, but given the situation, is now really the best time for this?
textByHash.38a98fb549b50581918751f5f7b78c3c21148ade: Unfortunately, about a century ago, the once thriving group was wiped out during the barbarian invasions of that time.
textByHash.38d98c7e572754510906fbf1f7d8ba9c1a3778b0: Oh yes. What was it you wanted to learn?
textByHash.3c017fdd93fc7d38d99cf4d16055d6b88faa088d: Well let's hope this works then. Things are starting to look a little bit problematic.
textByHash.42da3b65a1badc8ddac1518539baef0cf37c3849: Surok Magis. The teleport block should have stopped him escaping, but it seems he was able to use the zombies as a distraction and disable the spell.
textByHash.42eff6288d5b31d0e4e998185c801d4d4879b390: I see... Where did you find this half?
textByHash.4879d5081a67a0a7a62eaf46bc3604b2eb471b12: There are rumours that they are based in the south west corner of the city. Charlie the Tramp might be able to tell you more. He knows that part of Varrock well.
textByHash.499712f902c8a92c6b3833a786db1f22c28a8429: I believe a few of them survived, but with the bulk of their population destroyed, their numbers dwindled even further. If any are left now, they'll no doubt keep to themselves.
textByHash.4a39e83f7721c2195e5e5ff100971d088aa9ce16: Did you have any luck finding the Corvo family?
textByHash.4be04475769a23ce1c6e8b06833c043b2505b690: Robert the Strong is a name that often comes up in stories from the Fourth Age. There's no reason not to believe that these folk tales are based on events that actually happened.
textByHash.515c86680560e74f1c221a86342cb97590f01440: These little things seem to be everywhere these days! Perhaps you'd like them?
textByHash.576d8131f3574ee5c3637331068bf62ad2635bab: My name is Reldo. I'm the palace librarian.
textByHash.577d208030280f8d3126e568cc04680b76a777d9: Ah! Do you know about hot and cold clues?
textByHash.5ad83fe81bbc73aca3dc1686c5e4ad669e13397e: You should make some room for it before I can give you it.
textByHash.5c76a2828effb89c8d050f905f647d9b76364d88: Hmmm. I don't... believe there are any here...
textByHash.64adecf7686cbafb9826fd9a816680519ce6a6f4: No, sorry, that was just my little joke. I'm not the trading type.
textByHash.673d68d177f8735cc02f072e04aa119ed0c4d0fc: Well you'd better find it again. These books are very valuable.
textByHash.69886e02e3a3fdb4a6491061c19e1292327302a1: The other day I filed a book about ancient goblin tribes. It's somewhere at the west end of the library, I think. Maybe that will be of some use.
textByHash.69d9e8ad695092bafee66a4e99baff7d6df8d7ef: Any luck with your search for those descendants?
textByHash.6ca6ea6d11be320b4cc102de324a18d95bc67c44: 'The stories tell of the dragonkin being an intelligent race of bird-like creatures that walked rather than using their wings. They are said to be immortal, but cannot reproduce.'
textByHash.6f54b80071afef91837e953aff6309150e8db605: A split gang and a split shield. My guess would be that the other gang has the other half.
textByHash.7ad0c7500b6ec63abd69e033fe4492c70f1d6579: One of those elders would have been the original founder of the city.
textByHash.7b0d55f4446d4be0ec8a9883951e452f82492933: Port Phasmatys might be a good place to look. It's where most of the Morytania settlers wound up.
textByHash.7b91c87e6e085cbf0e38beaf1d4215e4456609ed: Okay let's see... The Corvo family... Here we are! According to this there was a family by the name of Corvo living in Avarrocka for most of the Fourth Age.
textByHash.7ce4d57836ee84bac76a457693f65f15ee289254: Very good. I suggest you give it a read.
textByHash.7f089c41019d61f497656b90860bc7ce9f56c653: Well, if you look around for book called The Shield of Arrav, you'll find a quest in there.
textByHash.82d5ea359f7e781a351c581e52b6d9f1a2410d4a: Notable families like that are unlikely to have changed their surnames over the years. If you consult the latest census, you'll hopefully find some matching names. You'll find it just next to the desk.
textByHash.83492711bb9daf05985cb5abc9723ee9c077a65c: I'm afraid that's all the help I can provide. Port Phasmatys is where most of the Morytania settlers wound up. Perhaps you'll find what you're looking for there.
textByHash.860222680c01a895b46d9f99260fb581775c4bf2: Although I would probably be in here even if I didn't work here. I like reading. Someday I hope to catalogue all of the information stored in these books so all may read it.
textByHash.89e624f15b7511e68b4e23404ab9e14aa140f66d: Well then use this strange device to feel where your destination is and dig.
textByHash.8b63322220384baf622b14d02d70d7d221f3461d: 'Not much is known about the hero called Robert the Strong. Most folk tales describe him as being taller than the tallest human and far stronger than the strongest warrior.'
textByHash.902d0ae6fe23e2646d2ccea626a6454dcb1a33b7: No, I don't. I think I know someone who might, however.
textByHash.9200fa984383a3fa387edfdec9f004422fda8117: 'He wields a six foot tall longbow and travels with his faithful panther, Odysseus. He is said to have had a personal crusade against the dragonkin...'
textByHash.9943d5af0c77644847a8dfbd54e01398225e3760: No, not yet... but I know I have seen it somewhere...
textByHash.9aae78284ed828ca91c5ede29b1e365ce3ee097a: Very odd. Have you any idea how it got there?
textByHash.9af9e09efdcd0573fd3f56cd9b9424b0ab62343f: I know it's around here somewhere. It's red if I remember right.
textByHash.9ccd460a7ed33992c36cdd5c5abc194304dd1c48: Ah, you use a strange device to tell you how far away you are from the place you need to be. When you get to your destination you dig.
textByHash.a0a073f677163485158b26badcc42d66e6299da0: Bye! Say hi to the other Petes for me.
textByHash.a18693213db5e4a5c6c7f40954f5c25759da9281: No, I don't. However, I hear Baraek, the fur trader in the market, has had connections with the Phoenix Gang.
textByHash.a5b1a2af7bf8c738e87955e18b68d41313a9491e: I've never seen that symbol before. Where did you find it?
textByHash.aa63b54c28e74ae10760a91070cc81ed2d9e3343: Ah, yes. I think I have something, if you're definitely interested?
textByHash.aaad264dfe3b6e8ecfc9bf00890c163a68dc7e08: If I were you I would talk to Baraek, the fur trader in the market place. I've heard he has connections with the Phoenix Gang.
textByHash.ad350a0001388b38750b6e71ee318a8c92fe2fd2: Ah, I am always delighted to hear from him. You would not imagine the depths of his wisdom!
textByHash.b007e99cf3265ef9ba7bedcbe471e0aaee074e7d: Well we do have census records which date back to when the city was still called Avarrocka, but I'm afraid we don't have anything from before that time.
textByHash.b06c679e75919b995fb8bc7deb0b10519aa562c8: That document on the desk in the corner should be of use. It listed the names of the elders who sent Arrav on his original quest for the shield.
textByHash.b40d8eb253f6bcf2d6567e1a64472ffba8a130d4: I have a book around here somewhere with all of the details, why don't you see if you can find it. It's red if I remember right.
textByHash.bce38eb487c6e63cfa2f6f588c9bfffa160f83a2: The last entry is from the year 1770 of the Fourth Age.
textByHash.bda1cb46e5b793917f85569cdb01584bbdf7acbb: Impossible to say for sure, but it was around that time that many people left Misthalin to settle in Morytania. It's possible that the Corvo family was among them.
textByHash.bee704a296d7244b05be36124b830841bb44e872: I have a book around here somewhere with all of the details. Why don't you see if you can find it? It's red if I remember right.
textByHash.c0782482ad72b9c49a4cfe4b1bd01ac4e3ea4ae8: That strange device will guide you in the same way the key did. Feel it, but be careful as it is very powerful. Good luck.
textByHash.c342ce20cbe55e38358072a28a6467f61dfdfc72: What can I do for you ?
textByHash.ce2e8426fbc379761d392249d7b8f81fd74658fd: My old friend Aubury sent me some runes in return for some books he wanted. Perhaps you'd like them?
textByHash.ceeb7347aad203eb1727e2de2ec4dad2e5703d81: Have you found that book yet?
textByHash.cef1e2ad1a7450d9f0afed91577aacf70e0da2b6: Ah yes. I think I have something, if you're definitely interested?
textByHash.cf45e041128521e8e68520c7f8224658e80bbc83: I've never heard of a goblin carrying a brooch like this. But just a minute...
textByHash.d1d9d8b6a1780cb909dd893a98c535c6d0340e08: What's happening? Where did all these zombies come from?
textByHash.d91b6a306abf5c1d61f31a3dcccbdd4fc580d745: Ah you must mean Tristan Corvo. I can't remember anyone ever asking about him before, most prefer to hear about the bigger heroes like Arrav or Robert.
textByHash.d9e910878aee7b23ccc740285e4fb6c60a5b49aa: Ah, you must mean Tristan Corvo. I can't remember anyone ever asking about him before. Most prefer to hear about the bigger heroes like Arrav or Robert.
textByHash.da1b45311e145f0d9f8e8a258f306361979ba2f4: Well if you look in a book called 'The Shield of Arrav', you'll find a quest in there.
textByHash.df05d10d8fc5c14e3ab0a571f9863891469f3ffa: Ah, yes... For many hundreds of years, they were the world's most skilled smiths. They used secret smithing knowledge passed down from generation to generation.
textByHash.e0df634fb80b6feaa3e87df2d238b48ec8b0e2d7: However, I have heard tales of their love for redberry pie. Perhaps one of those could convince one to reveal their true heritage.
textByHash.e3b6e4f3ea02861aa43a58344267ed3e93e6c6c5: Hmm... I don't believe there are any here.
textByHash.e42fce382bc0bd3d29e0164cac3e4b8853ba86fa: Well, not totally random. Apparently some of the surviving Imcando made a home for themselves near the cliffs on the Asgarnian southern peninsula. That would be a good place to start.
textByHash.ecab567e6aea5a1761cd081766a6945a7681fd67: 'Because of this, they became very afraid of death and shunned all other races.'
textByHash.f701304a10b3fc155675a4d66ee6277deb4163f7: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.
textByHash.f8a4f99ada15cbfa9d81669930751a7e87d401b0: Fourth Age... Popular Lore... Ah here we are, Robert the Strong!
